data.body: Impl notes (in progress): detection belongs in outbound_fields._diff_fields (has local, jira_fields, prev_jira_fields=baseline) — a both-sides conflict = local!=prev AND jira!=prev over _INBOUND_MIRRORED_FIELDS. Emission needs alert_store (module rebar_reconciler.alert_store: append(record,repo_root)/is_deduped(key,repo_root)) which is NOT in the differ path — thread a conflict sink out of compute_outbound_mutations to run_differs.py:319 (has repo_root) and emit a deduped BRIDGE_ALERT there, mirroring fetcher._flag_unmapped_statuses. Preserve local-wins (observability only).
